profile.title: Public profile
profile.description: This information will be displayed publicly so be careful what you share.
profile.avatar_hint: Enter a URL to your profile picture. File uploads coming soon.
profile.username_hint: Used in URLs and mentions. Only lowercase letters, numbers, dashes and underscores.
profile.display_name_placeholder: How you appear in the app
profile.email_hint: Email is managed by Authentik and cannot be changed here.
profile.bio_placeholder: Tell people a bit about yourself.
profile.bio_hint: You can @mention other users and organizations to link to them.

activity.title: Account activity
activity.description: Security-relevant events recorded by the user-service.

account.title: Account Management
account.description: Manage your account settings and preferences.
account.deactivate_description: Deactivating your account will permanently remove all your data and cannot be undone. This action will immediately log you out and remove access to all your projects and data.

deactivation_modal.title: Deactivate Account
deactivation_modal.confirm_question: Are you sure you want to deactivate your account?

messages.username_required: Username and display name are required.
